# pensiv Plugins

> Public monorepo for the pensiv plugin ecosystem. A pensiv plugin is a small
> TypeScript package authored against the typed
> `@pensiv/plugin-sdk` (a `Plugin` base class + a permission-gated Host API),
> built to an ES module the pensiv writing app installs. First-party plugins live
> here too and install through the same pipeline — nothing is baked into the app.

## Start here

- [Agent reference](AGENTS.md): the full authoring contract — manifest,
  lifecycle, what you can register, the Host API, permissions, settings schema.
- [Sample plugin](plugins/sample-plugin/src/main.ts): the canonical
  clone-and-edit starter (minimal shape — one command + settings tab).
- [Timer plugin](plugins/timer): the reference for non-trivial plugins. Read
  AGENTS.md "Reference plugin: Timer" for the patterns it encodes — one shared
  singleton store across surfaces, ephemeral run-state vs durable `app.storage`,
  a multi-surface `registerWidget` (floating + chip + sheet), and the i18n recipe.

## SDK contract (read these for exact types)

- [Plugin base class](packages/plugin-sdk/src/plugin.ts): onload/onunload,
  addCommand, registerWidget, registerEditorExtension, addSettingTab, …
- [Host API](packages/plugin-sdk/src/host-api.ts): app.editor / project /
  session / storage / ui / platform / app.
- [Contributions & settings schema](packages/plugin-sdk/src/contributions.ts):
  header/pane/sidebar contributions and the declarative SettingsSchema.
- [Widget contribution](packages/plugin-sdk/src/widget.ts).
- [Data model](packages/plugin-sdk/src/types.ts): manifest, permissions,
  installed-entry.

## Build

- [Shared vite config](packages/build-config/vite.shared.js): externalizes
  react + @pensiv/plugin-sdk; emits main.js (+ styles.css).

## Notes

- Code plugins target desktop/web. Mobile (iOS) cannot run downloaded code
  (Apple §2.5.2); declarative-only support comes later.
- The SDK is mirror-generated from the pensiv app; the published .d.ts is the
  source of truth for authors.
